activity.title: United States et al. v. Constellation Energy Corporation et al.; Proposed Final Judgment and Competitive Impact Statement
activity.raw_text: United States et al. v. Constellation Energy Corporation et al.; Proposed Final Judgment and Competitive Impact Statement

enrichment.summary: The DOJ Antitrust Division filed a Proposed Final Judgment and Competitive Impact Statement in United States et al. v. Constellation Energy Corporation et al., a civil antitrust case. The filing outlines proposed remedies to address competitive concerns raised by the government regarding Constellation Energy's conduct or a transaction. The Proposed Final Judgment, if entered by the court, would impose binding obligations on the defendants to resolve the antitrust violations alleged by the United States.
enrichment.stance_quote: United States et al. v. Constellation Energy Corporation et al.; Proposed Final Judgment and Competitive Impact Statement

source_entity.name: DOJ Antitrust Division
source_entity.description: Investigates AI-market concentration with FTC under a jurisdictional split (DOJ took Nvidia, Microsoft; FTC took OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). Live merger reviews shape compute-market structure; Google search remedies trial sets precedent for AI-product distribution mandates.
